title: Create Train Lights
description: Create addon that adds custom interior and head tail lights for trains that automatically switch between headlight and tail light depending on the direction of travel.
body:
## Create Train Lights Please also take a look at my other mods: * [Create Train Utilities](https://modrinth.com/mod/create-trainutilities) * [Create More Seats](https://modrinth.com/mod/create-more-seats) ![](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/dab894f613724987b6fde69b92ed96344a199abc_0.webp) Create addon that adds custom interior and head tail lights for trains that automatically switch between headlight and tail light depending on the direction of travel. [![](https://discord.com/api/guilds/1248636479627071488/widget.png?style=banner2)](https://discord.gg/DkcprwueFj) ## Dependencies * [Create](https://modrinth.com/mod/create) / [Create Fabric](https://modrinth.com/mod/create-fabric) * [Architectury API](https://modrinth.com/mod/architectury-api) ## Features ### Overview Video ### Head / Tail Lights
… and MORE! ### Interior Lights
… and MORE! ### More Features * can be turned off * head and tail lights change color depending on direction * can be controlled on contraptions with right click and contraption controls. * and more! ## Languages * English * Spanish (by Albertosaurio) ## Important! You should always back up your world before installing a mod update to protect your world from damage. ## Support me If you want to support me and my work, check out my Ko-fi Page ❤️ * [Ko-fi](https://ko-fi.com/adeptstack_programmerlp)
